evals.prompt: I need to migrate my ID Capture web app from SDK v7 to v8. Here's my main file: scanner-v7.ts, and my package.json: package-v7.json.
evals.expected_output: The skill detects v7 from package.json, updates the package versions, replaces configure()+DataCaptureContext.create() with DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey() (keeping idCaptureLoader in moduleLoaders), replaces settings.scannerType with settings.scanner = new IdCaptureScanner({ physicalDocument: ... }), and replaces Camera.default with Camera.pickBestGuess().

assertions.text: The license key is passed as the first argument to forLicenseKey
libraryLocation and moduleLoaders are passed as options to forLicenseKey
idCaptureLoader({ enableVIZDocuments: true }) is kept in moduleLoaders
settings.scannerType is replaced by settings.scanner = new IdCaptureScanner( with an options object containing physicalDocument
the IdCaptureScanner wrapper uses the options-object form ({ physicalDocument: new FullDocumentScanner() }), NOT the positional React Native form (semantic)
Camera.default is replaced with Camera.pickBestGuess() in the migrated code (semantic)
The @scandit/web-datacapture-core and @scandit/web-datacapture-id package versions are bumped to 8.x (semantic)
The migration guide link (7→8) is mentioned

evals.prompt: I'm upgrading my ID scanning web app from Scandit Web SDK v6 to v7. My package.json uses: package-v6.json. What changes do I need to make?
evals.expected_output: The skill explains the v6→v7 migration: package rename from unscoped to scoped, libraryLocation path change from build/engine to sdc-lib, supportedDocuments/supportedSides replaced by acceptedDocuments plus a scanner, and the session-based listener callbacks replaced by didCaptureId/didRejectId receiving the CapturedId directly.

assertions.text: The package rename from scandit-web-datacapture-* to @scandit/web-datacapture-* is mentioned
The libraryLocation path change from build/engine to sdc-lib is mentioned
supportedDocuments / IdDocumentType / supportedSides being replaced by acceptedDocuments (document objects with regions) plus a scanner is explained
The listener redesign is explained: didCaptureId and didRejectId receive the CapturedId directly, and the removed IdCaptureSession / session.newlyCapturedId must not be used in migrated code blocks
Timeout handling moving into didRejectId with RejectionReason.Timeout is mentioned
The migration guide link (6→7) is mentioned
npm/yarn/pnpm install command with the new scoped package names is shown
